ui.consentNeededDesc: Please obtain resident consent before exporting data.
ui.phiWarning: Do not include personal health information in email subject. Send via your organization's secure email or EHR portal.
ui.secureEmailReminder: Report downloaded. Please attach to your secure email.
ui.pdfGeneratedDesc: Report has been generated and downloaded

consent.title: Resident Consent
consent.text: I consent to data collection for this health assessment

descriptions.smoke_detectors_desc: Check at least one detector per floor; test buttons work
descriptions.carbon_monoxide_desc: At least one detector near sleeping areas
descriptions.moldVisible_desc: Check for visible mold or musty odors
descriptions.leakingPipes_desc: Inspect under sinks and around plumbing for leaks
descriptions.noVentilation_desc: Bathrooms/kitchens should have working exhaust fans or windows
descriptions.structuralDamage_desc: Cracks, sagging floors, or ceiling damage
descriptions.leadPaint_desc: Homes built before 1978 may contain lead paint
descriptions.asbestos_desc: Old insulation or tiles may contain asbestos
descriptions.smoking_exposure_desc: Indoor smoking or secondhand smoke present

sdoh.housing_stability: How stable is your current housing situation?
sdoh.food_security: Do you have enough food for your household?
sdoh.transportation: Do you have reliable transportation to get to appointments?
sdoh.social_support: Do you have someone to help you when you need it?
sdoh.healthcare_access: Do you have access to healthcare when you need it?
sdoh.employment_status: What is your current employment status?
sdoh.education_level: What is your highest level of education?
sdoh.income_adequacy: Is your household income enough to meet your needs?
